formattedAddress: 19 Stijepa Šarenca, Herceg - Novi, Црна Гора

text.text: Initially good.Endrocrinologist showed attitude "yeah well i dont care about your health concern, i will focus on other one i preffer instead", directly telling me she doesnt want to deal with me in the future. After me making mistake of doses of medicine, it was "you sure you can memorise two numbers?".Montenegrin doctor syndrome of a God allknowing

text.text: Врач гастроэнтеролог очень внимательно провел обследование, выслушал жалобы назначил лечение и анализы. После полученных результатов анализа позвонил мне лично и узнал как я себя чувствую. Лечение помогло, спасибо доктору🙏🏽 …

text.text: Fantasticana klinika. Osoblje jako ljubazno. Dr Mancic vrhunski strucnjak.

originalText.text: Fantasticana klinika. Osoblje jako ljubazno. Dr Mancic vrhunski strucnjak.

text.text: Perfect service and very polite, understanding and professional staff. Huge gratitude for support in English and Russian - it’s an amazing understanding and sensitivity to foreigners. Thank you for you work! Hvala Puno!

text.text: Profesionalno i ljubazno osoblje.Moja preporuka za sve kojima je potrebno.

text.text: I'm so glad for the support. They are so nice Humans. Doctor? She is professional. Highly recommend for you. Every place most clean. Smile faces at the every where. Five stars for all :))

text.text: Highly recommended: I am periodically visiting Normedica for my dermatologist (visiting from Novi Sad, Serbia) and endocrinologist appointments. With timely and precise diagnostics, highly professional staff, we have managed to keep my health issues under control. 2 doctors with previous experience in Norway's health system are an asset.
